title: Items Count Plus ( ICP )
description: Mod to indicate count items that player holds
body:
# Mod for the convenience game shows counts items of the same type as the one that player holds in his hand
Indicators ## Indicators: ``` Indicators show count items that player holds in his hands ``` ![Indicators count items in the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fcd05ca43c71ab652ca9216431f17265099a5bb.png) variantion in fabric!
Setting ## Setting: ``` Open setting: ~ ``` ![Setting in mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b538a7fdf63c2b91ed764a31c74cf457a62c7b3_0.webp)
Other ### Localisation: _eng_ _ru_ _es ( coming soon )_ _pt ( coming soon )_ _ua ( coming soon )_ _by ( coming soon )_
**Since version 0.1.0 requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** **Mod supports [mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**
